_warning: HAND-AUTHORED. A sync script that overwrites this file is a bug. verified:false means Shawn has not confirmed the reveal chapters against the manga yet.
_why_this_file_exists: A devil fruit's existence and nature are STORY REVEALS, not chapter-1 facts. No upstream source records WHEN the reader learns a fruit: data/raw/characters.json's fruit join is missing for half the presence roster and its names are translated. from_chapter here is the chapter at which the atlas may print this fruit's name and type. Scope: only entities that can appear on the map (crew_presence.json members and characters).
_semantics: canon_confidence rates the REVEAL-CHAPTER claim: canon = the fruit is shown and named in those chapters; derived = the power is on-page there but the name lands nearby; guess = the name only surfaces in supplementary material, stamped at the first on-page use. An entity with no row here reads as 'no fruit revealed' under the fruit lens — the atlas does not distinguish 'not a fruit user' from 'not revealed yet'; both are honestly unknown to a reader at that chapter.
_before_any_content_ships: Shawn must confirm every reveal chapter below against the manga and flip verified to true. Until then the UI renders these facts as unverified.

reveals.name: Buggy
